qa_pairs.question: In recent years, various medium-sized roundabouts in rural Scotland have been flattened on one half. However, mini-roundabouts and large gyratories are untouched. Why?
qa_pairs.answer: To transport huge wind turbine blades: mini-roundabouts can be driven straight over, large gyratories are wide enough, but medium-sized roundabouts have to be half-flattened so the trucks can get around them.

qa_pairs.question: After the King of France – Louis X – died on the 5th of June 1316, France had no king. His rightful heir – John I – eventually became king on the 15th of November. There were no legal disputes or pretenders to the throne. What caused the delay?
qa_pairs.answer: Louis X's wife was pregnant when he died, so they had to wait for the heir, John I, to be born.

qa_pairs.question: Why did Trevor put up a large billboard in Boston that read, "This is Boston"?
qa_pairs.answer: Trevor Rainbolt, a Geoguessr streamer, put it up so that if the location ever appeared in Geoguessr or on a stream, players would immediately know they were in Boston.

qa_pairs.question: Around 250,000 Americans will get married this year, partly because Jonathan Badeen forgot to turn on his bathroom fan. How?
qa_pairs.answer: Because Jonathan Badeen, co-founder of Tinder, got the idea for Tinder's swipe gesture by wiping a steamed-up bathroom mirror after forgetting to turn on the fan; Tinder leads to many marriages.

qa_pairs.question: In 1892, the American football team of Gallaudet University hit a snag when they played a team with the same student profile as theirs. Their solution was copied by other teams who did not need it. What was the problem and the solution?
qa_pairs.answer: Gallaudet's deaf players used sign language to communicate plays, but against another deaf team those signs could be read, so they invented the huddle to hide them.

qa_pairs.question: After the writer John Leavitt added smashed avocado to his bacon, lettuce, tomato sandwich, what small protein item did he add next?
qa_pairs.answer: A quail's egg, making the sandwich an LGBTQ.

qa_pairs.question: Why do some people celebrate their birthday on the 25th of June, even though that's nowhere near their real birthday?
qa_pairs.answer: Because their real birthday is on or near December 25th, so they celebrate a half-birthday on June 25th to get presents at a separate time of year.
